name: Meta Ads CTR (click-through rate)
definition_short: This performance metric tells you which percentage of people saw your ad and thought, “Yep, I’ll click that.” A high CTR is one of the first signals that your ad creative works. But clicks aren’t sales: You also need to keep an eye on other Meta ad metrics (e.g., ad spend and conversions).
gotchas: Formula shown for transparency and may follow source-specific reporting definitions.
